faqs.question: How much does silverfish control cost in Flatbush?
faqs.answer: Silverfish control services in Flatbush typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property and the severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: Why are silverfish so common in Flatbush buildings?
faqs.answer: Flatbush's many older homes and pre-war apartment buildings often have moisture issues in basements, bathrooms, and kitchens where silverfish thrive. These pests feed on starches, paper, and fabrics, making Brooklyn's historic buildings with book collections and stored items particularly vulnerable.
